svg.aria-label: Highlighted source capture for initial high-burden pool considered
svg.text: Initial high-burden pool considered: faricimab prior-agent proxy
Saved source-text capture from the public FARICIMAB treatment-pattern poster.
Prior anti-VEGF exposure among faricimab initiators
Previously treated initiators: 82.1% had 1 prior agent.
16.4% had 2 prior agents; 1.5% had 3 prior agents.
Use in model: proxy for early refractory or high-burden launch consideration, not all nAMD eyes.
The base case uses an 18% launch considered pool, then applies access, adoption, and competition gates.
Source linked in the card: Faricimab prior-agent proxy.
